message:
docs(action): align version references with v0.2.1

- update README example to point at v0.2.1

- refresh action README example version

- bump action fallback tag in action.yml

files.patch:
@@ -658,7 +658,7 @@ dcg update
 Optional flags mirror the installer scripts (examples):
 
 ```bash
-dcg update --version v0.2.0
+dcg update --version v0.2.1
 dcg update --system
 dcg update --verify
 ```

@@ -99,7 +99,7 @@ Scan the entire repository:
 ```yaml
 - uses: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/action@v0
   with:
-    dcg-version: v0.2.0
+    dcg-version: v0.2.1
 ```
 
 ## What Gets Scanned

@@ -86,7 +86,7 @@ runs:
 
         if [ "$VERSION" = "latest" ]; then
           # Get latest release tag
-          VERSION=$(curl -sL https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name // "v0.2.0"')
+          VERSION=$(curl -sL https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name // "v0.2.1"')
         fi
 
         echo "Installing DCG version: $VERSION"
